paragraph.part2: , a passionate software engineer student and a diehard lover of computing in its entirety, from the most challenging software to the intricate secrets of hardware operation.

About_Card.title: About me
About_Card.intro: Technology Consultant and Official Odoo Partner, specialized in ERP implementation, process automation, and infrastructure solutions for businesses.
About_Card.more: I combine experience in software development, DevOps, and systems integration to help companies adopt technology in a practical, scalable, and results-oriented way.

Technology.title: Technological Stack
Technology.description: With knowledge across many languages and technologies. I invite you to explore them all on my
Technology.contact: or contact me to learn everything I am capable of 👍

Experience.title: My experience
Experience.paragraph1: Throughout my career, I have participated in projects focused on automation, infrastructure, ERP, and software development, collaborating with companies and teams in various technological environments. This experience has allowed me to understand both the technical side and the real operational needs behind each implementation.
Experience.paragraph2: Currently, I am primarily dedicated to advising companies in a transparent and direct manner, helping them make practical and sustainable technological decisions according to their real needs. Thanks to my experience in different areas of technology —from frontend and backend development to DevOps, infrastructure, and ERP system implementation— I have developed a technical and operational vision that allows me to understand both the technological part and the real challenges within companies.

ExperienceProjects.title: More of my experience
ExperienceProjects.description: An editable selection of experiences, cases, or projects that you can connect to independent external pages.
ExperienceProjects.drag_hint: Drag the cards to explore more experiences

Team.title: My team
Team.description: Trusted collaborators and profiles I work with or recommend for the quality of their work.
Team.drag_hint: Drag the cards to switch team member

Contact.title: Let's work together through Katze
Contact.description: For projects, implementations, or technology consulting, contact is handled through my company Katze. There you can learn more about the services and start a direct conversation.

Not_Found.title: This route was lost in the system
Not_Found.description: The resource you are trying to open does not exist, was moved, or is still under construction. You can return home and keep exploring from a safe route.

Blog.title: Blog
Blog.description: Ideas, lessons, and notes about development, software, and technology.
Blog.empty: There are no published posts yet.

About_Hero.title: Software Engineer specialized in scalable solutions.
About_Hero.description: In addition to working in software development and infrastructure, I currently collaborate with companies and projects as an Official Odoo Partner, helping to implement ERP solutions, automation, and scalable technologies focused on optimizing processes and generating real value through modern and open-source tools.
About_Hero.odoo: // Meet Odoo, I'm an Official Odoo Partner with my company Katze

WIP.paragraph: Hello everyone! I'm excited to share my work on this page with you. I want you to know that this project is still in progress. If you like what you see so far and want to contribute, your help is more than welcome! Also, if you're interested in following my progress closely or just want to get in touch, I'm active on my social networks. Although these are temporary, I'll always be available.
WIP.extra: Still not sure what to think about that navbar... Shall we change it?
